import time

LATENCY_THRESHOLD_MS = 500
ERROR_RATE_THRESHOLD = 0.05
SATISFACTION_THRESHOLD = 0.95


def check_api_health(metrics_collector):
    p99_latency = metrics_collector.get_p99_latency("api")
    if p99_latency > LATENCY_THRESHOLD_MS:
        trigger_alert("API latency exceeded threshold")

    error_rate = metrics_collector.get_error_rate("api")
    if error_rate > ERROR_RATE_THRESHOLD:
        trigger_alert("API error rate exceeded threshold")


def check_order_slo(metrics_collector):
    success_rate = metrics_collector.get_success_rate("orders")
    if success_rate < SATISFACTION_THRESHOLD:
        trigger_alert("Order SLO breached")

    latency = metrics_collector.get_p95_latency("orders")
    if latency > 300:
        trigger_alert("Order latency degraded")


def trigger_alert(message: str):
    print(f"ALERT: {message}")
